en: You too, you too. Hey, think about that policy, huh?
OK, that's two for one. That's a good deal. Doppelganger special.
Look what I got free at the checkout. It's a chef's pal.
It's a dicer, grater, peeler, all in one. Never need sharpening.
That is a beer. You're soaked.
Where have you been? I figure we can scrape together $8,000.
Every time you and Marlon get together, there's a- We can bum around the world for a year on that.
ko: 그걸로 1년 동안 세계를 떠돌 수 있어.

en: We really ought to throw out that mower. Get one of those new elk rotaries.
Why don't you let me fix you some of this new MoCocoa drink?

en: No artificial sweeteners. What the hell are you talking about?
Who you talking to? I've tasted other Cocoas.
This is the best. Good, good morning, Truman. Oh, look who's here.
